name: Via Renewables, Inc. 8.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
description: Via Renewables Inc is an independent retail energy services company. The company provides residential and commercial customers in competitive U.S. markets with electricity and natural gas sourced from wholesale providers, offering an alternative to traditional utilities. It bills customers based on consumption at fixed or variable prices, while delivery is handled by local regulated utility companies through existing infrastructure. Its segments are the Retail Electricity segment, which generates the majority of revenue and involves purchasing electricity through physical and financial transactions with market counterparties and ISOs, and the Retail Natural Gas segment, which similarly procures and supplies natural gas to customers under fixed- and variable-price contracts.
